  if type(_G["jPcTW5xEZv"])~="table" then return false end

end
do
  if not MnjuK68x2i() then
    local __t=nil

  end
end
local function _TpKHGjy(x)
  local NG2KHP_1=(x*16)-(x*16)
  local RLoZIxrJM=(NG2KHP_1+37)-37
  if RLoZIxrJM~=0 then return x end
  return x
end
_TpKHGjy(1)
do local NG2KHP_1=1; local RLoZIxrJM=1; if (NG2KHP_1+RLoZIxrJM)==3 then NG2KHP_1=NG2KHP_1+1 end end
do local PaAIruUCE=0; while PaAIruUCE<1 do PaAIruUCE=PaAIruUCE+1 end end
do local KmzIvIgvf=1; local WZdbOakwkf=0
  while true do
    if KmzIvIgvf==1 then
      WZdbOakwkf=WZdbOakwkf+1
      if ((WZdbOakwkf*18)-(WZdbOakwkf*18))==0 then KmzIvIgvf=2 else KmzIvIgvf=3 end
    elseif KmzIvIgvf==2 then
      if (70-70)~=0 then WZdbOakwkf=WZdbOakwkf+9 end
      break
    else
      break
    end
  end
end

local function __vm_bxor(a,b)
  local r=0
  local bit=1
  while a>0 or b>0 do
    local aa=a%2
    local bb=b%2
    if aa~=bb then r=r+bit end
    a=(a-aa)/2
    b=(b-bb)/2
    bit=bit*2
  end
  return r
end

  end
  return table.concat(t)
end
